content: Hey, I'm Finley. I'm a startup founder, and I love working on new projects and ideas.
That's exciting, Finley! What kind of projects do you usually work on?
I'm really into AI tools, and I've been working on a new product that I think could really make a difference. I also love doing origami in my free time, it's so calming.
Origami is a great hobby, Finley. What kind of origami do you like to make?
I love making cranes and boxes, they're so delicate and intricate. I also enjoy woodworking, it's a great way to create something with my own hands.
Woodworking sounds like a great hobby, Finley. Do you have a favorite type of wood to work with?
I love working with cedar, it smells so good and it's really durable. I've been doing some woodworking projects in my garage, it's a great way to relax.
That sounds like a lot of fun, Finley. What do you like to do with the things you make?
I usually give them to my family and friends as gifts, it's a great way to show I care. I've also been taking care of my aging parents, it's been a challenge but it's worth it.
That's very kind of you, Finley. It's great that you're taking care of your parents. Do you have any siblings who help out?
I have a younger sister, she lives in Lisbon too, it's great to have her close by. I love living in Lisbon, it's such a beautiful city.
Lisbon is a great city, Finley. I've heard the food is amazing there. What's your favorite Portuguese dish?
